Bash(GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: migrate webapp UI to shadcn/ui, persist onboarding to DB, unify back navigation

- Replace custom CSS components \(buttons, cards, badges, forms, messages, links\)
  with shadcn/ui primitives \(Button, Card, Badge, Input, Dialog, Select, etc.\)
- Add cn\(\) utility, components.json, and Radix UI dependencies
- Create backward-compatible wrappers: SimpleTooltip, Toggle \(Switch\)
- Delete 7 CSS files, add CSS variable aliases in globals.css for plain CSS
- Add hasSeenOnboarding column to users table for cross-device persistence
- Update auth service: updateProfile saves onboarding state, login allows
  unverified users \(verification only required at registration\)
- Unify back navigation: replace all BackLink with CompactPageTitle,
  delete unused BackLink component

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: on-demand KRA result fetch and decouple Gemini from KRA sync

- Add on-demand result fetch in RacesService.findOne\(\): when a user
  views a race that has ended but has no results, trigger KRA API
  fetch with 1-min cooldown per rcDate to prevent excessive calls
- Decouple Gemini prediction generation from KRA result sync:
  replace onResultsSyncedForRace \(accuracy + Gemini\) with
  updateAccuracyOnly \(accuracy only\) in fetchRaceResults
- Remove generatePredictionsForDate fire-and-forget call from
  processDueBatchSchedules to prevent Gemini 429 cascading to KRA
- Predictions are now handled independently by PredictionsScheduler

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: enhance AI prediction UX with okrace-inspired improvements

- Redesign HorseScoresBarChart with score explanation header, color
  legend \(80+ very likely / 60+ likely / 40+ possible\), tier labels,
  and improved sub-score breakdown with strength/weakness summary
- Upgrade PredictionFullView confidence badge to visual gauge card
  with natural language description of prediction confidence
- Add simulator shortcut button in prediction view for direct access
- Add AI limitation disclaimer with link to AI about page
- Enhance HitRecordBanner with dividend highlights, bet type badges,
  and high-payout featured cards \(10x+ odds\)
- Add per-bet-type accuracy dashboard \(win/place/quinella/trifecta\)
  with progress bars and explanation
- Create /about/ai page with 15-factor system guide, analysis
  architecture pillars, step-by-step usage guide, and limitations
- Add AI prediction replay section for completed races showing
  AI's predicted rankings, reasoning, and post-race analysis
- Server: enrich hit records with RaceDividend data, add byBetType
  accuracy stats computed from prediction scores vs actual results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: prevent races from showing results before actual race time

Server: Add _isRacePast\(\) and _correctStatus\(\) to races.service.ts.
Status is only set to COMPLETED when results exist AND race time has
actually passed \(date-based for past dates, stTime+buffer for today\).
Races with premature result data are kept as SCHEDULED.

Client: Change isRaceCompleted to use only time-based check
\(isRaceActuallyEnded\). Server COMPLETED status alone is no longer
trusted since KRA batch sync can load results for races that haven't
started yet on the same date.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git add server/Dockerfile railway.toml && GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
perf: multi-stage Docker build to reduce memory usage

- Split Dockerfile into build and prod stages
- Build stage: install all deps, compile TS
- Prod stage: only production deps + compiled output + python
- Image size: ~7GB -> ~820MB \(89% reduction\)
- Add NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=256 to limit Node heap
- Copy only server/shared compiled output + python scripts
- devDependencies, webapp, admin, mobile excluded from prod image

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git push origin master)

Bash(GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git add server/Dockerfile railway.toml && GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: increase Node heap to 512MB and fix multi-stage deps

- Increase --max-old-space-size from 256 to 512 \(NestJS+TypeORM needs
  ~300MB during startup, 256 caused OOM before healthcheck\)
- Use 3-stage build: build -> prod-deps -> runtime
- Add healthcheckTimeout=300 to railway.toml
- Fix pnpm --prod install in separate stage for reliable dep resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git push origin master && GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git checkout develop && GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git merge master --no-edit && GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git push origin develop && GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git checkout master)

Bash(GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git add server/src/kra/kra.service.ts server/src/database/entities/batch-schedule.entity.ts server/src/database/migrations/20260329000000-AddBatchScheduleRetryCount.ts docs/db/schema.sql && GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: auto-retry failed batch schedules and extend cron window

- Add retryCount column to batch_schedules \(migration + entity + schema\)
- processDueBatchSchedules now also picks up FAILED jobs with
  retryCount < 3 for automatic retry
- ensureResultFetchJobsForEndedRaces skips dates where all retries
  are exhausted \(prevents infinite job creation\)
- Extend cron window from 9-19 to 9-21 KST \(covers late races\)

EOF
